meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Speed Up Dev with Antigravity Template
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship high-quality client apps at record speed.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, stop writing boilerplate from scratch. Use the Antigravity project template to initialize production-ready architecture instantly. Combine this with Claude Code to automate repetitive coding tasks, allowing you to focus on high-value features and meet tight client deadlines without sacrificing code quality or maintainability.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and you’re still wrestling with project initialization, environment variables, and folder structures. Every hour spent on boilerplate is an hour you aren't charging for high-level engineering. This is the silent killer of freelance profitability, turning profitable projects into endurance tests.

But there is a better way. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you can bypass the 'blank slate' syndrome entirely. When paired with the raw power of Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into an architect, deploying robust, scalable foundations in minutes instead of days. It’s time to stop building the same foundation twice.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Start by cloning the core template. This provides the modular architecture required for rapid scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard boilerplate, including TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI configurations.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Establish your data structures early to ensure type safety across the entire application stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a SaaS user management system including roles, subscription tiers, and audit logs.

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Use the template's built-in handlers to create secure, type-safe API endpoints in seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create CRUD endpoints for the 'Project' resource using the Antigravity handler pattern with Zod validation.

steps.title: Implement Authentication Middleware
steps.description: Secure your app immediately using the template's pre-configured auth integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Auth.js with the existing Antigravity middleware layer to protect all /api/v1 routes.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Run the final health check to ensure your boilerplate is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a comprehensive audit of the project structure and suggest optimizations for build speed.

pro_tips: Always use the --dry-run flag in Claude Code to review generated file changes before they touch your local disk.
Alias your Antigravity CLI commands in your .zshrc to reduce 'boilerplate tax' to just a few keystrokes.
Inject your specific client's design tokens into the Antigravity theme config before running the first component generation.
Use Claude Code's context-aware chat to document your custom components as they are built, ensuring a clean handover for the client.
Keep a 'snippets' folder synced across projects to reuse complex logic that isn't covered by the base Antigravity template.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, document your custom component library within the Antigravity structure to make your next client project even faster.
content.conversion_block: Stop manually writing boilerplate and start scaling your freelance business with elite-level workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
